title: Test Infrastructure Setup and Debug Flow
interaction_flow: --- WebServer Bootstrap ---
TestSuite → WebServer: new WebServer(indexFile, host, port, ddprofServiceName)
WebServer → WebServer: realpath(indexFile), set defaultInis[error_log], defaultInis[datadog.trace.sources_path]
TestSuite → WebServer: mergeEnvs(envs) — merges defaultEnvs + stored envs + caller envs
TestSuite → WebServer: mergeInis(inis) — merges defaultInis + stored inis + caller inis
TestSuite → WebServer: start()
WebServer → WebServer: set inis[datadog.trace.debug]=true (unless DD_TRACE_DEBUG already set)
WebServer → WebServer: snapshot errorLogSize = filesize(error_log)
WebServer → WebServer: resolve SAPI type (roadrunnerVersion / isOctane / isSwoole / isFrankenphp / DD_TRACE_TEST_SAPI env var)
alt [roadrunnerVersion set] WebServer → RoadrunnerServer: new RoadrunnerServer(version, indexFile, host, port, envs, inis)
alt [isOctane] WebServer → OctaneServer: new OctaneServer(indexFile, host, port, envs, inis)
alt [isSwoole] WebServer → SwooleServer: new SwooleServer(indexFile, port, envs, inis)
alt [isFrankenphp] WebServer → FrankenphpServer: new FrankenphpServer(indexFile, host, port, envs, inis)
alt [cgi-fcgi] WebServer → PhpCgi: new PhpCgi(FCGI_HOST, FCGI_PORT, envs, inis, ddprofServiceName)
alt [fpm-fcgi] WebServer → PhpFpm: new PhpFpm(dir, FCGI_HOST, FCGI_PORT, envs, inis, maxChildren, user, group, sudo, masterInis)
alt [apache2handler] WebServer → PhpApache: new PhpApache() (singleton) + loadConfig(dir, host, port, envs, inis)
alt [default] WebServer → CliServer: new CliServer(indexFile, host, port, envs, inis)
WebServer → Sapi: sapi.start()
opt [sapi.isFastCgi()] WebServer → NginxServer: new NginxServer(indexFile, host, port, FCGI_HOST, FCGI_PORT)
opt [sapi.isFastCgi()] WebServer → NginxServer: server.start()
opt [sapi.isFastCgi()] WebServer → NginxServer: waitUntilServerRunning() — throws Exception on timeout
--- Test Execution (reload / checkErrors) ---
TestSuite → WebServer: reload() — delegates to sapi.reload() or marks test skipped
TestSuite → WebServer: checkErrors() — reads error_log diff from errorLogSize offset, filters ddtrace error/warn lines, calls sapi.checkErrors()
--- Teardown ---
TestSuite → WebServer: stop()
WebServer → WebServer: usleep(DD_TRACE_AGENT_FLUSH_INTERVAL * 2 * 1000) — wait for BGS trace flush
WebServer → Sapi: sapi.stop() (unless PhpApache singleton)
WebServer → NginxServer: server.stop() (if FastCGI)
--- DebugTransport (Trace Capture) ---
TestSuite → DebugTransport: new DebugTransport()
Tracer → DebugTransport: send(tracer) — calls tracer.getTracesAsArray(), merges into internal $traces array
DebugTransport → DebugTransport: setHeader(key, value) — pushes {key:value} onto $headers array
TestSuite → DebugTransport: getTraces() — returns captured $traces array
TestSuite → DebugTransport: getHeaders() — returns captured $headers array
--- DebugLogger (Log Capture) ---
TestSuite → DebugLogger: new DebugLogger() — calls parent::__construct(LogLevel::DEBUG)
DDTrace internals → DebugLogger: debug(message, context) — interpolate + append [DEBUG, msg] to $records
DDTrace internals → DebugLogger: warning(message, context) — interpolate + append [WARNING, msg] to $records
DDTrace internals → DebugLogger: error(message, context) — interpolate + append [ERROR, msg] to $records
TestSuite → DebugLogger: has(level, message) — searches $records for exact level+message match
TestSuite → DebugLogger: hasOnly(level, message) — asserts exactly one record matching level+message
TestSuite → DebugLogger: all() — returns full $records array
--- PackageUpdater (CI Dependency Maintenance) ---
CI/Script → PackageUpdater: new PackageUpdater() + run()
PackageUpdater → PackageUpdater: findTestFiles() — RecursiveIterator on tests/Integrations, filters *Latest*Test.php
PackageUpdater → PackageUpdater: processFile(file) for each file
PackageUpdater → PackageUpdater: findLibrary(className, file) — calls className::getTestedLibrary() or reads composer.json require key
PackageUpdater → PackageUpdater: findComposerFile(className, file) — calls getAppIndexScript/getConsoleScript, walks up to Frameworks dir
PackageUpdater → PackageUpdater: updatePackageVersion(library, composerFile)
PackageUpdater → PackagistAPI: GET https://repo.packagist.org/p2/{library}.json (curl, 10s timeout)
PackagistAPI → PackageUpdater: JSON response with packages[library] versions
PackageUpdater → PackageUpdater: filter stable versions (exclude alpha/beta/rc/dev), sort desc, extract semver
PackageUpdater → PackageUpdater: if latestVersion != currentVersion → update composer.json, record in $updates
PackageUpdater → PackageUpdater: displaySummary() — prints updates table, exits(1) on errors
key_relationships: WebServer composes Sapi (interface, one of: CliServer, PhpCgi, PhpFpm, PhpApache, RoadrunnerServer, OctaneServer, SwooleServer, FrankenphpServer)
WebServer optionally composes NginxServer (only when sapi.isFastCgi() == true)
PhpApache is a singleton — persisted across test suite lifetime via static $apache
DebugLogger uses DDTrace\Log\InterpolateTrait (interpolate() for message templating)
DebugLogger initialized with LogLevel::DEBUG — captures all log levels
PackageUpdater reads integration test class methods: getTestedLibrary(), getAppIndexScript(), getConsoleScript()

default_inis.datadog.trace.debug: true (auto-set unless DD_TRACE_DEBUG env is set)

important_notes: WebServer is final — not intended for subclassing
DebugTransport is an in-memory stub replacing the real HTTP agent transport — traces never leave the process
DebugLogger captures all log output in-memory for assertion in tests (has/hasOnly/all query API)
BGS = Background Sender — WebServer.stop() waits 2x flush interval to ensure traces are dispatched
PackageUpdater skips non-Packagist libraries (ext-* prefixed or no slash in name e.g. wordpress)
PackageUpdater only targets Latest* test directories — pinned to newest stable semver
WebServer.checkErrors() only surfaces ddtrace-tagged errors/warnings/deprecations from the error log
